themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and public benefits. This theme is prominently featured in Spain, Italy, and the UK, with parties like Vox, Fratelli d'Italia, Lega, and Reform UK advocating for these measures as a cornerstone of their political platforms.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox promotes 'national priority' policies in Andalusia and other regions, emphasizing preferential treatment for Spanish citizens in social services and housing.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Fratelli d'Italia and Lega advocate for policies that prioritize Italian citizens in public services and benefits, aligning with their nationalist agenda.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK pushes for policies that prioritize British citizens in social welfare and public services, echoing similar themes in their local election campaigns.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN emphasizes 'national priority' in its political messaging, focusing on protecting French citizens' access to public resources.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are dominating coverage of far-right governments and movements in Argentina, Hungary, and Poland. These scandals involve high-ranking officials and party leaders, raising questions about transparency, accountability, and the integrity of these administrations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni, Argentina's Chief of Staff, faces allegations of illicit enrichment and misuse of public funds, sparking a political crisis.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungary's Tisza Party faces scrutiny over nepotism and questionable appointments, including the nomination of relatives for key government positions.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Poland's PiS faces allegations of corruption and misuse of public funds, including scandals involving high-ranking party members.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN is under investigation by the European Public Prosecutor's Office for alleged fraud involving EU funds used for media training during the 2022 presidential campaign.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Far-right parties are making significant gains in polls and local elections across Europe, reflecting growing public dissatisfaction with mainstream parties. This trend is evident in Germany, Sweden, the UK, and Norway, where parties like AfD, Sverigedemokraterna, Reform UK, and Fremskrittspartiet are capitalizing on voter frustration.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads polls in Saxony-Anhalt with 41% support, signaling a potential shift in Germany's political landscape.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Sverigedemokraterna continues to gain traction in Swedish polls, reflecting growing support for their nationalist policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK makes historic gains in local elections, surpassing Labour in several traditional strongholds and threatening mainstream parties.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Fremskrittspartiet maintains strong polling numbers in Norway, capitalizing on public dissatisfaction with immigration and economic policies.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's policies and actions continue to dominate right-wing media coverage worldwide, with a particular focus on his administration's economic, immigration, and foreign policy decisions. This theme resonates strongly in the US, Italy, Poland, and the UK, where Trump's influence shapes political discourse and policy debates.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies on tariffs, immigration, and foreign relations are central to US right-wing media, with ongoing debates about their impact on the economy and global standing.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian media closely follows Trump's policies, particularly his stance on immigration and trade, which aligns with the nationalist agenda of Fratelli d'Italia and Lega.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish right-wing media highlights Trump's foreign policy, especially his approach to NATO and relations with Russia, as a model for Poland's international stance.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK frequently references Trump's policies on immigration and trade, using them to critique the UK government's approach to similar issues.

themes.title: EU climate policy sparks cross-national backlash
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are rallying against EU climate policies, framing them as economically burdensome and detrimental to national sovereignty. This backlash is particularly strong in Poland, Hungary, and Germany, where leaders are calling for referendums or policy reversals to counter the EU's Green Deal.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish President Karol Nawrocki proposes a referendum on EU climate policies, arguing they increase living costs and harm the economy.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungary's Tisza Party criticizes EU climate policies, advocating for a more flexible approach that prioritizes national economic interests.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD opposes EU climate policies, arguing they harm Germany's economy and sovereignty, and advocates for policy reversals.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN criticizes EU climate policies, framing them as economically damaging and calling for a reassessment of France's commitments.
